repo.description: A PyTorch implementation of Deep SAD, a deep Semi-supervised Anomaly Detection method.

terms.context_snippet: This repository provides a [PyTorch](https://pytorch.org/) implementation of the *Deep SAD* method presented in our ICLR 2020 paper ”Deep Semi-Supervised Anomaly Detection”.
